assumptions.statement: The role is likely an internship-level marketing position, based on its title; no seniority, prior-experience, or educational requirements are stated.
assumptions.source_statement: We need a Marketing Intern for summer.

ambiguities.description: “Creative” is subjective and does not specify observable, job-relevant work outputs or behaviours. Clarify the types of marketing work or examples of creative contribution expected.
ambiguities.source_statement: They should be creative and good with social media.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: A candidate requirement cannot be evaluated consistently without defined, observable expectations.

ambiguities.description: “Good with social media” does not identify relevant platforms, expected activities, proficiency level, or evidence of capability.
ambiguities.source_statement: They should be creative and good with social media.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: The required social-media skills and scope need definition before they can be treated as assessable requirements.

ambiguities.description: “TikTok stuff” does not specify whether the work involves content ideation, creation, posting, community engagement, analytics, or another activity.
ambiguities.source_statement: They'll work with the team on TikTok stuff and help with campaigns.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: The specific TikTok responsibilities determine the relevant skills and expected deliverables.

ambiguities.description: “Help with campaigns” does not specify the campaign types, tasks, channels, or level of ownership.
ambiguities.source_statement: They'll work with the team on TikTok stuff and help with campaigns.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: The campaign-support scope is needed to define the role accurately.

ambiguities.description: “Fun to work with” is subjective culture-fit language. Clarify the observable, job-relevant collaborative behaviours expected when working with the team.
ambiguities.source_statement: Should be fun to work with.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: Personality-based language should be translated into specific collaboration expectations rather than used as a candidate requirement.

ambiguities.description: Summer timing is not defined by dates, duration, expected weekly hours, or work location.
ambiguities.source_statement: We need a Marketing Intern for summer.
ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: Candidates need the practical internship schedule and location expectations to determine availability.

next_question.question: What specific TikTok and campaign tasks will the summer Marketing Intern be responsible for?
